verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Life is easy, when you're up on the mountain And you've got peace of mind, like you've never known But when things change, when you're down in the valley Don't lose faith, for you're never alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the God on the mountain, is still God in the valley When things go wrong, he'll make them right And the God of the good times is still God in the bad times The God of the day is still God in the night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We talk of faith when we're up on the mountain Talk comes so easy when life's at its best But in the valleys, of trials and temptations That's where your faith, is really put to the test
